settings.search_intro: Invite-only controlled pilot search shell — not a public launch. Live ranking and final pricing remain deferred; purchase actions stay disabled.
settings.summary_copy: Placeholder results only — not a full catalogue view. Purchase actions are unavailable; delivery and fulfilment details are not final.
settings.empty_description: The no-results experience is now in place, but live search terms, product results, and browse recovery behaviour remain intentionally deferred.
settings.browse_copy: Browse launch-department links for orientation only — controlled pilot does not imply the full catalogue is available.
